title: ANBL - (Almost) No build limit
description: allows you to build from y -1024 to 1024
body:
## This mod is Completely Serverside. the players on your server don't need to install this mod

### Have you ever wanted to build gigantic Skyscrapers that span kilometers in height?

Or maybe you always wanted to explore mountains that are as big as Mount Everest and Caves that are spanning almost to the Earth's core

Well now you can, This mod changes the build limit to heights up to 1024 and lows spanning down to -1024.

This mod also changes the mountains in amplified terrains to be way bigger and have floating islands above them.



##### Oh yeah this is my first Mod what actually modifies Game files and not just add them, so if there are any bugs let me know


Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/almost-no-build-limit
